summary: Tested marketing site navigation updates for industry pitch pages. Main homepage and pitch pages have correct nav with all 10 industries. However, other marketing pages (pricing, digital-card, etc.) have incomplete desktop Solutions dropdown showing only 2 industries instead of 10.

ui_bugs.issue: Marketing pages (pricing, digital-card, features, etc.) only show 2 industries (Automotive, Sales Teams) in desktop Solutions dropdown instead of all 10
ui_bugs.note: Mobile menu has all 10 industries correctly - only desktop dropdown is missing industries

action_items: Update desktop Solutions dropdown on all marketing pages (pricing, digital-card, features, etc.) to include all 10 industries in 2-column grid layout matching the main homepage

Pitch pages (/pitch/real-estate/, /pitch/powersports/) have full marketing nav with all dropdowns working
Mobile menu on all pages has all 10 industries correctly
Desktop Solutions dropdown on other marketing pages only has 2 industries (Automotive, Sales Teams) - needs update

test_credentials: No login required - public static HTML pages
